report.summary: Cycle-close v10: GIT LOCKS CLEARED — batch commit 21aaf5b pushed to origin/main (170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages). Vercel build deploying. 13/13 critical pages returning 200 in production. 5/6 API routes healthy; /api/market-metrics still 404 in production (P1). Fear-greed data 2 days stale (last: Mar 23). 4 new pages built this cycle (Lido v3, Institutional Adoption, Congressional Tokenization, BitGo IPO). PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items. 13 uncommitted files remain. TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking). Local build OOM (Bus error) — Vercel build is source of truth.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 13/13 critical pages verified 200 on production: /, /tools, /learn, /exchanges, /wallets, /prices, /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /tools/gas-tracker, /compare, /investing, /taxes, /defi-lending
All page response times <12ms (CDN-served, fast)
4 new pages built since last cycle: lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026, institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026, congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026, bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide
New pages return 404 on production — expected: 2 are in PUBLISH_QUEUE (not yet promoted), 2 were just committed
103 legacy published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged from v9)
Total page.tsx files: 1,172 (+2 from v9)
TypeScript errors: 15 in structured-data.examples.ts (documentation file, non-blocking for production)
Local build fails with Bus error (OOM in sandbox) — not indicative of Vercel build health
Lint script misconfigured in package.json (next lint resolves to wrong path) — pre-existing issue

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 5/6 core API routes healthy in production: fear-greed (200), trending (200), market-dominance (200), defi-yields (200), prices (200)
ISSUE [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally and was included in batch commit. Possible Vercel routing issue or build error on this specific route
/api/health returns 200 (518ms) — reports all services healthy, CoinGecko 86ms, cache 98ms, analytics 88ms
Rate limit status: 1,499/1,500 remaining (healthy headroom)
Cache TTLs verified on production headers: market-dominance has proper s-maxage=300 + SWR=600. Fear-greed, trending, defi-yields, prices all return 'public' cache headers
DATA FRESHNESS ISSUE: Fear & Greed timestamp is 2026-03-23 — 2 days stale. Value=8 (Extreme Fear) appears to be cached stale data from the weekend dip. Current F&G should be ~35
Trending data is live (SIREN, fresh CoinGecko data). Prices data is live (BTC, ETH current). Market dominance is live (BTC 56.7%)
0/6 core API routes have rate limiter middleware applied (unchanged — only /api/health uses checkRateLimit)

sections.title: DevOps
items: RESOLVED [was P0]: Git locks cleared. Batch commit 21aaf5b pushed to origin/main. Branch is up-to-date with remote.
Commit includes: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes — the largest single deploy in project history
Vercel deployment: Site is LIVE at degen0x.com. Homepage loads correctly with market ticker, navigation, and content sections
13 uncommitted files remain: 4 new build reports, 2 modified learn pages, community drafts, NotificationCenter update, new notifications API route + feed data
ISSUE: /api/market-metrics 404 persists post-deploy — needs investigation (route file exists but may have build-time error that Vercel caught)
Performance: All page loads <12ms from CDN. API health check 518ms. Market dominance 1ms (cached). Overall response times excellent
No error spikes detected on accessible endpoints. All tested pages render correctly

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Build-v10 created 4 new learn guides (Lido v3 stVaults, Institutional Adoption, Congressional Tokenization Hearing, BitGo IPO Infrastructure). Community-v10 drafted social cards + posts. Design-v10 created OG images.
MAJOR MILESTONE: Git locks cleared after 10 days — batch commit deployed with 170+ pages. This is the single biggest deploy in project history.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026, bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide) — ready for next promotion batch
CARRY-OVER [P1]: market-metrics 404 in production. Fear-greed data stale (showing Mar 23 value of 8 instead of current ~35). 103 missing page.tsx for legacy slugs.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 0/6 rate limiters on core APIs. 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. Lint script misconfigured.
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: Investigate /api/market-metrics 404 (check Vercel build logs). Push the 13 remaining uncommitted files. Promote PUBLISH_QUEUE batch before Thu catalyst day.
STRATEGIC: Thu Mar 27 convergence ($13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings) is 2 days away. The batch deploy landed just in time — 170+ pages now reachable by crawlers. Maximize indexing window.
